what_was_done: Fixed code indexer not running. Boot trigger failed because socket_available(retries=1, delay=0.1) was too aggressive — MCP not ready in 100ms. Added re-check with retries=3, delay=0.5 before reindex trigger. Wrap-up trigger was broken too — SKILL.md called search_knowledge('reindex', mode='code') which just searched, didn't trigger reindex. Replaced with UDS reindex_code('wrapup') bash call. Both code_index and code_wrapup collections now populating correctly.
next_steps: Verify config.json toggles survive task reset
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
Flaky test: Lever4 TriggerC (capture queue state-dependent, passes on re-run)
